channel.title: Jahrbücher für Nationalökonomie und Statistik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Jahrbücher für Nationalökonomie und Statistik

item.title: Guest Editorial
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2024-0079

item.title: Is Blood Thicker than Water? The Impact of Player Agencies on Player Salaries: Empirical Evidence from Five European Football Leagues
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0098

item.title: When Colleagues Come to See Each Other as Rivals: Does Internal Competition Affect Workplace Performance?
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0080

item.title: Pregnancy in the Paint and the Pitch: Does Giving Birth Impact Performance?
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2024-0054

item.title: An Empirical Estimation of NCAA Head Football Coaches Contract Duration
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0090

item.title: Race, Market Size, Segregation and Subsequent Opportunities for Former NFL Head Coaches
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0092

item.title: Football Fans’ Interest in and Willingness-To-Pay for Sustainable Merchandise Products
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0102

item.title: Change in Home Bias Due to Ghost Games in the NFL
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0087

item.title: Consumer Perceptions Matter: A Case Study of an Anomaly in English Football
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0095

item.title: Talent Allocation in European Football Leagues: Why Competitive Imbalance May be optimal?
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0104

item.title: SOEP-LEE2: Linking Surveys on Employees to Employers in Germany
item.description: Article by Peter Winker DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jbnst-2023-0031

item.title: The IAB-SMART-Mobility Module: An Innovative Research Dataset with Mobility Indicators Based on Raw Geodata
